name: travel-trackers
description: Travel Trackers full-stack app (backend + client + admin dashboard)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix ./server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./client --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./admin-dashboard --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build:all: npm run build:client && npm run build:admin
scripts.build: npm install --prefix ./server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./client --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix ./admin-dashboard --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build:client && npm run build:admin
